s15_kl_qat_8000_steps.notes: KL-only full-model QAT from bare Dual-SVID, 8000 steps, full-test 250k tokens. Generation degenerate despite the PPL; see littlebit_math.md §15.

phase_b_kl_plus_mse.notes: KL + 10*MSE end-to-end QAT, 20000 steps (pre-Sprint-0). 88.5% hidden-state capture, sentence-level loop generation.

dual_svid_init_no_training.notes: Bare Dual-SVID init, no training. Measured in s4_4_klqat_from_scratch at step 0.

s4_1_pure_teacher_brecq.notes: 24-block BRECQ with pure-teacher inputs, 500 steps/block, RMSNorm bug present. 11.7 min wall time.

s4_2_propagated_brecq_unfixed.notes: 24-block BRECQ with propagated inputs, 500 steps/block, RMSNorm bug + wd=0.01 + wrong-scale loss. 17.2 min.

s4_2_propagated_brecq_fixed.notes: BRECQ propagated with RMSNorm freeze + wd=0 + .sum(-1).mean() loss. 17.2 min.

s4_3_polish_on_fixed_500_steps.notes: Polish on s4_2_propagated_fixed, KL + 10*MSE, lr=1e-4 flat, 500 steps. Best intermediate 387 at step 300.

s4_4_klqat_from_scratch_500_steps.notes: KL QAT from bare Dual-SVID, same polish recipe, 500 steps. 2.5 min.

s4_5_polish_tuned_1000_steps.notes: Polish on s4_2_propagated_fixed, lr=5e-5 cosine+warmup, lambda=5, 1000 steps. Plateau at ~380.

s4_6_qat_refine_1500_steps.notes: Warm restart from s4_5 at lr=1e-4, lambda=10, grad_accum=2, 1500 steps. Final slightly WORSE than init (381 -> 393). Confirms PPL 380 is the floor from this init.

s5_0_refined_init_no_training.notes: Full-model activation-weighted ALS scale refinement, Frobenius signs frozen, 15 iters per linear. 230s build time. WORSE than bare Dual-SVID (380k). Scale refinement optimizes per-matrix at teacher activation distribution; fails to compose and over-fits away from student inference distribution.

s5_1_polish_on_refined_diverged.notes: Polish (lr=5e-5 cosine+warmup, lambda=5) from s5_0 refined init. Step 100 matched bare init's s4_4 trajectory, step 200 catastrophically diverged (polish unstable on refined-init scales). Killed at step 200. Refined init's unusual scale magnitudes incompatible with polish optimizer.

s6_0_mr_K2_no_training.notes: Multi-rank-magnitude Dual-SVID init with K=2 (rank-2 SVD approx of |Up|, |Vp|). Single-matrix activation rel-err on gate_proj L12 improved 0.88->0.70 (27% better). BUT end-to-end init PPL is 4x WORSE than bare Dual-SVID (1.52M vs 380k). Diagnostic: max per-row norm of reconstructed W is 55% larger at K=2 vs K=1 (1.27 vs 0.82). K=2's sharper reconstruction has larger outlier entries that amplify through the residual stream.

s6_1_mr_K1_sanity.notes: Multi-rank class at K=1 should be numerically identical to bare Dual-SVID. Confirmed: PPL 379980.006 exactly matches bare (379980.006). No bug in multi-rank forward path; K=2 regression is structural not implementational.
